data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — retroactive analysis confirms feasibility reviewer would have flagged w21-bwfw as HIGH-RISK (scores: technical_feasibility=1, integration_risk=1) due to ACLI priority editing being contradicted by available documentation, and would have required a spike task before preplanning. w21-24kl correctly assessed as moderate risk. Gate design validated.
